name: @metorial/desktime
description: Retrieve employee time tracking and productivity data from DeskTime. Access company settings, employee work hours, attendance records, and productivity breakdowns (productive, neutral, unproductive time). Look up employees by ID or email and retrieve app/website usage data for specific dates or monthly periods. Create projects and tasks, and start or stop project time tracking for integration with external tools. Useful for compiling attendance reports, monitoring team productivity, and integrating with payroll or invoicing systems.
